name: org.machanism.machai:machai-cli
description: Machai CLI (org.machanism.machai:machai-cli) is a Spring Boot + Spring Shell based Java command-line application (interactive REPL) for developer tooling in the Machanism/Machai ecosystem. It provides Spring Shell commands to: (1) generate bindex metadata files by scanning a project directory (bindex), (2) register generated bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint (register), (3) perform GenAI-assisted semantic search and similarity-threshold based selection of libraries/artifacts using a natural-language prompt (pick), (4) assemble/scaffold an output project into a target directory based on the user prompt and the picked bindex set (assembly), (5) send ad-hoc prompts to the configured GenAI provider/model (prompt), (6) run Ghostwriter guidance processing over files/directories with concurrency, excludes, instructions and guidance prompts, and optional logging of LLM request inputs (gw), (7) run Ghostwriter "Act mode" to execute predefined interactive actions/prompts via ActProcessor against a scanned project (act), and (8) clean Machai temporary folders named ".machai" under a root directory (clean). Configuration defaults are persisted via a local machai.properties file managed by ConfigCommand (shell key: set --key/--value), and an alternate file can be loaded into JVM system properties at startup via -Dconfig=<path> (MachaiCLI.loadSystemProperties). The CLI integrates with Machai bindex-core (BindexCreator, BindexRegister, Picker, ApplicationAssembly) and Machai ghostwriter (GuidanceProcessor, ActProcessor, Ghostwriter property keys), uses SLF4J/Logback logging (console INFO, rolling file DEBUG), and is intended to automate metadata management, library discovery, and GenAI-assisted project scaffolding and document/code processing in Java workspaces.

usageContext: Non-interactive command execution (invoked via Spring Shell command methods)
Generating bindex.json metadata for projects/artifacts via directory scanning
Registering bindex metadata to an external registry service
GenAI-assisted semantic search over bindex artifacts with similarity threshold filtering
GenAI-assisted application/project assembly using selected bindex libraries
Ghostwriter guidance pipeline for scanning and processing files/directories with concurrency and excludes
Ghostwriter Act mode for interactive execution of predefined actions/prompts
Local workspace cleanup of Machai temporary .machai folders
Loading persisted CLI defaults from machai.properties and optional -Dconfig overrides

constructors.description: Creates the command component that exposes semantic search (pick), application assembly (assembly), and ad-hoc prompting (prompt). Loads optional configuration from machai.properties via a PropertiesConfigurator; if the file is not present, defaults are used. A lazy-injected JLine LineReader is used for interactive prompting when the user does not provide required arguments.

examples.snippet:
org.jline.reader.LineReader lr = null;
org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand(lr);
examples.description: Creates the command instance (normally managed by Spring Shell). If lr is null, interactive prompting will not be available.

constructors.description: Creates the bindex command facade that generates bindex files and registers them into an external registry. Uses a PropertiesConfigurator for bindex-core operations and reads defaults from ConfigCommand.config.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (normally managed by Spring Shell) for generating and registering bindex metadata.

constructors.description: Creates the clean command component used to remove Machai temporary directories named ".machai" under a root directory resolved from configuration or the current user directory.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (normally managed by Spring Shell) for cleaning temporary folders.

constructors.description: Creates the configuration command component that reads/writes persistent CLI defaults to machai.properties via a shared static PropertiesConfigurator (ConfigCommand.config).

examples.description: Creates the command instance (normally managed by Spring Shell) that manages persistent configuration defaults.

constructors.description: Creates the Ghostwriter guidance command component. Uses an injected (lazy) LineReader to prompt for instructions/guidance when options are provided but empty. Resolves defaults from machai.properties via ConfigCommand and loads the configuration file for processor execution.

examples.snippet:
org.jline.reader.LineReader lr = null;
org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand(lr);
examples.description: Creates the command instance (normally managed by Spring Shell) for running Ghostwriter guidance processing.

constructors.description: Creates the Ghostwriter Act mode command component which scans a configured project folder and executes a predefined action/prompt interactively via ActProcessor. Loads machai.properties when available and resolves the project directory and model from persisted configuration.

examples.description: Creates the command instance (normally managed by Spring Shell) for executing Act mode actions.

features.name: pick
features.signature: void pick(java.lang.String query, java.lang.String registerUrl, java.lang.Double score, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Performs GenAI-assisted semantic search to pick bindex artifacts matching a natural-language query. If query is null, prompts interactively via JLine; if query points to an existing file, reads the prompt from that file. Resolves model and score defaults from ConfigCommand (keys: ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME and "score") and delegates to org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker; prints matched bindex IDs with similarity scores. Optionally uses an external registry URL.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand((org.jline.reader.LineReader) null);
cmd.pick("Create a web app with REST and persistence", "http://localhost:8080", java.lang.Double.valueOf(0.9d), "OpenAI:gpt-5.1");
examples.description: Runs semantic search to pick libraries for the prompt with a minimum similarity score and an optional registry service.

features.name: assembly
features.signature: void assembly(java.lang.String query, java.io.File dir, java.lang.String registerUrl, java.lang.Double score, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Assembles/scaffolds an application/project in the target directory using a GenAI provider/model and a picked set of bindex artifacts. If query is omitted, reuses the last pick query and results; otherwise performs a new pick and then assembles. Delegates generation to org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly.

examples.description: Picks libraries for a prompt, then assembles a project into ./out using the previously picked bindex list.

features.name: prompt
features.signature: void prompt(java.lang.String query, java.lang.String chatModel, java.io.File dir)
features.description: Sends a free-form prompt to the configured GenAI provider/model, optionally sets a working directory, and prints the response. Loads provider tools via org.machanism.machai.ai.tools.FunctionToolsLoader and executes the prompt through org.machanism.machai.ai.manager.GenAIProvider.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.AssembyCommand((org.jline.reader.LineReader) null);
cmd.prompt("Suggest a module structure for a Spring Boot app", "OpenAI:gpt-5.1", new java.io.File("."));
examples.description: Requests guidance from the GenAI provider and logs the returned response.

features.name: bindex
features.signature: void bindex(java.io.File dir, boolean update, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Scans a project directory and generates bindex metadata files, optionally updating previously saved data. Resolves defaults for project directory and model from ConfigCommand and delegates scanning/generation to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand();
cmd.bindex(new java.io.File("./my-project"), true, "OpenAI:gpt-5.1");
examples.description: Generates (and updates) bindex files for ./my-project using the specified GenAI provider/model.

features.name: register
features.signature: void register(java.io.File dir, java.lang.String registerUrl, boolean update, java.lang.String model) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Registers bindex files found under a directory to an external registry database endpoint. Resolves defaults for project directory and model from ConfigCommand and delegates upload/registration to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister. Supports update mode.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.BindexCommand();
cmd.register(new java.io.File("./my-project"), "http://localhost:8080", true, "OpenAI:gpt-5.1");
examples.description: Registers bindex metadata from ./my-project into the registry service at the provided URL.

features.name: clean
features.description: Deletes all Machai temporary directories named ".machai" under the specified root directory (defaults to the configured directory or the user directory).

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.CleanCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.CleanCommand();
cmd.clean(new java.io.File("./my-project"));

features.name: gw
features.signature: void gw(int threads, java.lang.String model, java.lang.String instructions, java.lang.String guidance, java.lang.String excludes, java.lang.Boolean logInputs, java.io.File projectDir, java.lang.String[] scanDirs)
features.description: Runs the Ghostwriter guidance pipeline to scan and process directories or files using GenAI guidance. Supports concurrent processing (threads), custom instructions and default guidance (as text/URL/file path), excludes list, scan directories, and optional logging of LLM request inputs. Delegates to org.machanism.machai.gw.processor.GuidanceProcessor and resolves defaults via ConfigCommand using Ghostwriter property keys (gw.model, gw.instructions, gw.guidance, gw.logInputs).

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.GWCommand((org.jline.reader.LineReader) null);
cmd.gw(1, "OpenAI:gpt-5.1", null, null, "target,.git", java.lang.Boolean.FALSE, new java.io.File("."), new java.lang.String[]{"./docs"});
examples.description: Processes ./docs with Ghostwriter, excluding target and .git directories.

features.name: act
features.description: Runs Ghostwriter "Act mode" by scanning the configured project folder and executing a predefined action/prompt interactively via org.machanism.machai.gw.processor.ActProcessor. Builds the default prompt by joining the provided tokens, resolves defaults from machai.properties via ConfigCommand, supports logInputs (gw.logInputs), and determines scanDir from gw.scanDir or defaults to the project directory.

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.cli.ActCommand cmd = new org.machanism.machai.cli.ActCommand();
cmd.act(new java.lang.String[]{"commit"});
examples.description: Runs the predefined "commit" action in Act mode (interactive).

features.name: config-set
features.signature: void set(java.lang.String key, java.lang.String value) throws java.io.IOException
features.description: Sets or gets a persistent CLI configuration property stored in machai.properties. If value is null, prints the current value for the key; otherwise writes and saves the value.

examples.description: Sets the default semantic-search similarity score threshold and persists it to machai.properties.

customizations.name: machai.properties
customizations.description: Persistent configuration file used to customize default CLI behavior across commands. Common properties include default project/work directory (project.dir), default GenAI provider/model identifiers (for example: model, gw.model), default semantic search similarity threshold (score), Ghostwriter prompts (gw.instructions, gw.guidance), logging of LLM request inputs (gw.logInputs), and optional scan directory override (gw.scanDir).

examples.snippet:
model=OpenAI:gpt-5.1
project.dir=/path/to/workspace
score=0.9
gw.model=OpenAI:gpt-5.1
gw.excludes=target,.git
gw.logInputs=false
examples.description: Sets default model and project directory, semantic search score threshold, and Ghostwriter defaults.

customizations.name: -Dconfig
customizations.description: System property used at startup to point to an alternative properties file to be loaded into JVM System properties (defaults to machai.properties in the working directory). Implemented by org.machanism.machai.cli.MachaiCLI.loadSystemProperties().

examples.description: Starts the CLI and loads configuration properties from the provided file path.

examples.scenario: Pick libraries and assemble a project
steps: pick --query "Create a web app with REST API and persistence" --score 0.9 --registerUrl http://localhost:8080
